name: SIRL query: --query "publisher=Google" returns all rule ids derived from sources matching that publisher
setup:
printf 'src-g:
  publisher: Google
  url: https://g.com
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
  rules:
    - r-google-1
src-x:
  publisher: Other
  url: https://x.com
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
  rules:
    - r-other-1
' > SIRL.yaml
